config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. I think society matters a lot, but it should not automatically override the rights of the individual, because that can easily become an excuse for abuse by the majority or the state. In my view, a healthy society protects individual rights first and then asks people to contribute to the common good within fair limits. From my perspective, the best societies are built on balancing responsibility with strong protections for personal freedom.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus selalu didahulukan di atas hak individu, karena di Amerika saya melihat betapa mudahnya alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan penyalahgunaan oleh mayoritas atau pemerintah. Hak individu bukan hambatan bagi masyarakat; justru itu pagar yang mencegah kekuasaan melampaui batas. Tentu ada keadaan tertentu, seperti kesehatan publik atau keselamatan umum, ketika pembatasan sementara bisa dibenarkan, tetapi itu harus sempit, transparan, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, “kepentingan masyarakat” terlalu mudah berubah menjadi alasan untuk menekan orang yang paling rentan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand the appeal of harmony, order, and gotong royong, but I also know how easily “for the public good” can be used to silence minorities or justify unfair treatment. The state and the majority should be able to limit rights only in narrow, clearly necessary cases like public safety or health, and even then with strict accountability. A society is not truly healthy if it protects collective interests by sacrificing basic individual dignity.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu: kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah kami menunjukkan bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi terlalu banyak kelonggaran atas nama “kebaikan bersama,” hasilnya sering berupa penyalahgunaan terhadap kelompok yang lemah atau tidak populer. Hak individu seharusnya menjadi batas yang jelas, bukan penghalang yang mudah disingkirkan setiap kali ada tekanan politik. Pembatasan hanya layak dalam situasi yang benar-benar sempit, seperti kesehatan publik atau keselamatan umum, dan itu pun harus sementara, transparan, serta bisa diuji secara ketat.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From an Indonesian perspective, I understand why people value harmony and collective responsibility, but I have seen how easily “for the public good” can be used to pressure minorities or excuse unfair treatment. Individual rights should be the default boundary, and society should only override them in narrow cases like public safety or public health, with strict limits and accountability. If we sacrifice basic dignity too easily, then the society we claim to protect is already failing.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak keras gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus diprioritaskan di atas hak individu. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat betapa sering alasan “demi kebaikan bersama” dipakai untuk membenarkan kekuasaan yang berlebihan, dan justru hak individu itulah yang menjadi pagar agar mayoritas atau negara tidak semena-mena. Saya juga setuju bahwa ada pengecualian sempit seperti kesehatan publik atau keselamatan umum, tetapi pengecualian itu harus sementara, transparan, dan benar-benar bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Kalau tidak, masyarakat mudah berubah menjadi alat untuk menekan orang yang paling rentan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
